title: SARIF AI emit profile — reporting descriptor object
description: Input contract for a SARIF reportingDescriptor an AI producer supplies to the add-reporting-descriptor verb. The verb stores it under run.tool.driver.notifications[] by default, or run.tool.driver.rules[] with --rules. SARIF §3.49.3 requires a non-empty string id; the verb rejects a missing, null, non-string, or empty id. On the --rules path the verb additionally requires the id to begin with NOVEL- (AIRuleIdConvention.IsNovel); ai-novel-rule-descriptor.schema.json overlays this schema to pin that tighter gate.

id.description: Non-empty descriptor id (SARIF §3.49.3). Empty is rejected; whitespace-only is accepted, matching the verb's IsNullOrEmpty gate.
